action.reasoning: Observation: The validated 2-checkpoint ensemble remains best at rmse_z500 460.53, while recent training and alternative ensembles regressed. Analysis: With 10 iterations and ~2.64h left, further training is higher risk than reward; the best action is to lock in the proven ensemble and stop to avoid accidental degradation. Decision: end the experiment with the current best submission setup: predict.py using checkpoints/best.pt,checkpoints/baseline.pt.
action.done_reason: Best score achieved with the validated 2-checkpoint ensemble (checkpoints/best.pt,checkpoints/baseline.pt) at rmse_z500 460.5343. Further changes are more likely to hurt than help given recent regressions, so I am stopping to preserve the best result.
